calendar.matters:
Petition To Authorize And Direct Pro Rata Division Of Trust Assets.
Off Calendar Oct-07-2008 Denied

Petition For Determination That Position Statement Of Beneficiary, Apirath La Ongsuwan On Petiton To Authroize And Direct Pro Rata Division Of Trust Assests...
Off Calendar Jul-14-2008 Advanced From Aug-19-08 To Jul-21-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Authorize And Direct Pro Rata Division Of Trust Assets.
Off Calendar Aug-06-2008 Continued To Aug-27-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Authorize And Direct Pro Rata Division Of Trust Assets.
Off Calendar Jul-23-2008 Continued To Aug-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rowena Navia for and with Romeo Shair Ali. Kim Schoknecht for the Salvation Army. William Gutierrez for Aparath La Ongsuwan. Edward Watson for Union Bank Of California. Richard Wall for the SPCA.

The parties presented oral argument to support their positions. The Court stated that the response to the objection filed by the bank was not verified. The matter was taken under submission.

The parties requested that the matter go back on the record and stated that they had a possible settlement, but that they needed time (2 weeks) to contact an unrepresented party who resides outside of California. They also requested the Judge hold his decision in abeyance while they try to settle the matter. The matter was continued to August 6, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Wong.

Petition For Determination That Position Statement Of Beneficiary, Apirath La Ongsuwan On Petiton To Authroize And Direct Pro Rata Division Of Trust Assests...
Off Calendar Jul-21-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Reed for Union Bank Of California (Successor Trustee). William Gutierrez for Apirath La Ongsuwan (Petitioner).

Mr. Reed stated that the Trustee takes no position in this matter. The Court found that the petition does not violate the no contest clause, (signing the order for the same in open court.

Judge: Raymond Arata. Reporter: Sandra Petritsch CSR#11684. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Ex Parte Application For Order Shortening Time And Advancement Of Hearing Date For Petition For Determination
Off Calendar Jul-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
